name: dk-pivot
description: Dedicated install for the bundled Solid server. Kept separate from the app root so componentsjs' module scan only sees the server's own dependency tree — scanning the root (with its file:-linked sol-components/podz) drags in nested packages whose component contexts need remote lookups and breaks startup. customise-me.json's ./node_modules/mashlib paths also resolve here (the server runs with this folder as cwd).
